intro: Oldenlandia recurva is a type of flowering plant, specifically a member of the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its numerous health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
